text.p: Hi , good news indeed. He was one of the people l contacted to be my academic host. He responded a bit late though positively, during which time l had already gone far with you. I'll be glad to meet him and for his role in strengthening my proposal. Thanks a million. Best,

Many thanks for your mail. I am sorry l won't be able to see you today. I am really scared of going out because of the harsh weather which is not friendly at all on me. Please, Could we know the program for tomorrow. When we should come, the lunch and start of our presentations. Hoping to hear from you soon. Best,
Hello , I'll endeavour to explain when l meet you tomorrow. Please when can we see you tomorrow in your office. Hoping to hear from you soon. Best,
